field_help.tool_name: Name of the tool (lowercase, no spaces). Example: clustalomega
field_help.description: Short description of the tool purpose. Example: Sequence alignment
field_help.recommended_version_date: Release or validation date of the recommended version. Select the date using the calendar picker (format shown: yyyy/mm/dd). It will be automatically saved in the correct format (dd/mm/yyyy) in the final JSON. Example: 25/11/2024
field_help.bug_found: List versions with known bugs (comma-separated). Leave empty if none
field_help.not_working: List versions that do not work (comma-separated). Leave empty if none
field_help.no_longer_tested: List versions that are no longer tested (comma-separated). Leave empty if none
field_help.latest_version: Latest available version of the tool. Example: 1.2.4
field_help.manual_url: URL to official documentation or usage guide. Example: http://www.clustal.org/omega/clustalo-api/
field_help.source_url: URL to source code repository. Example: https://github.com/GSLBiotech/clustal-omega
field_help.comments: Optional notes about the tool (known issues, tips, etc.)
field_help.gui_command: Command to launch GUI version (only if tool has GUI). Leave empty otherwise
field_help.podman: Podman compatibility status. Use: supported, unsupported, or untested
field_help.singularity: Singularity compatibility status. Use: supported, unsupported, or untested
field_help.invocation_general: Base Docker command used for all executions (without tool-specific parameters). Example: docker run --rm -v /your/data/dir:/data pegi3s/clustalomega
field_help.usual_invocation_specific: Typical command arguments used with the tool. Example: -i /data/fastaFile -o /data/output/output.fasta
field_help.usual_invocation_specific_comments: Optional: add extra comments to explain placeholders or parameters used in the command. Example: output.fasta is the name of the aligned output file.
field_help.test_invocation: Command arguments used for automated testing. Example: -i /data/test/data/small_not_aligned.fas -o /data/test/results/sequences_aligned.fasta
field_help.docker_image: Docker image used for testing (with version tag). Example: pegi3s/clustalomega:1.2.4
field_help.input_file: Name of input test file (not full path). Example: small_not_aligned.fas
field_help.output_dir: Name of the output directory generated during execution. Example: clustalomega_output
field_help.output_file: Name of the output file generated by the tool. Example: sequences_aligned.fasta
field_help.add_configs: Optional extra flags or configuration parameters used during testing. Leave empty if not needed
field_help.commands: Full command used in automated tests (including paths and redirections). Example: -i /data/input_data/file.fas -o /data/output_folder/output.fasta > /dev/null 2>&1
field_help.input_data_type: Type(s) of input data. Use comma-separated values. Example: fasta, pdb, txt
field_help.icon_url: URL to tool logo or icon. Example: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/s-andrews/FastQC/refs/heads/master/uk/ac/babraham/FastQC/Resources/fastqc_icon.svg
field_help.pubmed: Search keyword for PubMed. Example: clustalomega
field_help.scholar: Search keyword for Google Scholar. Example: clustalomega
field_help.bioprotocol: Search keyword for BioProtocol. Example: clustalomega
field_help.bioprotocol_exchange: Search keyword for BioProtocol Exchange. Example: clustalomega
